app.name: Practice Loop
app.one_sentence_promise: Play your instrument and get real pitch and rhythm-stability feedback on the actual piece you're practicing, not just a metronome click.
app.target_user: Serious amateur and pre-professional instrumentalists who practice alone without a teacher present to catch intonation and timing drift.
app.painful_moment: Practicing a difficult passage alone and not being sure if it's actually improving.
app.why_different: Analyzes practice rather than merely timing it — piece-specific pitch/rhythm feedback instead of generic metronome and streak mechanics.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited pieces, historical trend analysis, and per-passage breakdowns versus a single-piece free tier.
app.subscription_model: Free: 1 tracked piece, basic timer + log. Paid (~$7.99/mo or $59/yr): unlimited pieces, on-device audio analysis feedback, progress trends.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Local practice-session log, on-device audio capture and analysis (pitch tracking, tempo-stability detection), per-piece history and trend view.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Repository protocol boundary now; later, optional cloud backup and teacher-sharing of progress reports.
core_workflows: start a practice session for a piece
record and get real-time pitch/rhythm feedback
track progress per piece over time
ios_native_features: On-device audio analysis (AVAudioEngine, no cloud call)
Live Activities during an active session
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device audio pitch/rhythm analysis is the core value driver, not a bonus — works fully offline.
app.design_direction: Calm studio aesthetic — warm wood/brass tones, waveform-driven visuals.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a premium iOS music-practice app called Practice Loop. Calm studio aesthetic, live waveform and pitch-accuracy visualization during recording, per-piece progress history, session summary screen. Include empty state and a low-signal/no-input error state.
app.app_store_positioning: The practice partner that actually listens.
key_risks: Analysis accuracy varies by instrument family
Ambient noise could degrade analysis and needs graceful handling
app.invalidation_criteria: If real instrumentalists find feedback inaccurate, rework before the paid tier leans on it.
app.v1_build_scope: Single-user local practice log, on-device audio analysis for one or two instrument families at launch, per-piece history/trends, full state coverage, StoreKit 2 paywall.
